name: sisense-to-sigma
description: Migrate Sisense to Sigma — ElastiCube / Live data models → Sigma data model, and Sisense dashboards (widgets) → Sigma workbook. Pulls live over the Sisense REST API (datamodel schema export, dashboards + widget JAQL), translates JAQL formulas to Sigma formulas, maps widget types (pivot→pivot-table, indicator→KPI, chart→chart, filters→controls), and verifies data parity by running JAQL against Sisense and comparing to the Sigma query. Honors the sibling converters' 'flag, never fake' contract: custom JAQL functions, blox/widget plugins, scripted dashboards, and unsupported viz are surfaced as loud flags rather than silently mis-converted. Includes a read-only estate assessment. Companion to the sigma-migration-skills converters.
